name: Vegetable Tamale Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Flour, all purpose (add to above)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Spray an 8" x 8-inch pan with non-stick cooking spray.
3. In the prepared baking pan, place all filling ingredients.
4. Toss until well mixed; set aside.
5. To prepare the tamale topping, in a medium bowl, mix flour, cornmeal, baking powder, baking soda, and salt until evenly combined.
6. In a small bowl, beat yogurt, egg, and margarine.
7. Add the wet ingredients to the dry mixture and stir just until the dry ingredients are moistened.
8. Spoon the mixture evenly over the vegetable filling.
9. If desired, sprinkle chives evenly on top.
10. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the filling is hot and bubbly, and the topping is lightly browned. A toothpick inserted in the center should come out clean.
